OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Continued To Sep-18-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: 12:00pm
Judge Feng addresses the Defendant re her not appearing with an interpreter, as advised by the Court. Judge Feng asks Donna Lok to step in briefly, to listen to him as he addresses the defendant about not having an informal or formal interpreter. Rory W. Clark, counsel for the plaintiff states she wants to go to trial, that defendants have had adequate time to find an interpreter, and are not willing to discuss a settlement. Ms. Clark states she is not available to return in the afternoon. Ms. Lok then explains to the defendant that the matter will be continued by the Court, back to Dept. 210, at 9:30am. The matter will be assigned for trial if the matter is not settled before Judge Feng on sep-18-09. Defendant is ordered to appear with a translator, formal or informal, and be prepared to find a translator if case is sent out for trial. Notice is waived.
